message.content: Describe what you see in this image in one short sentence.

The image is a simple, minimalist illustration of a smiley face. It features two white eyes and a curved smile, all set against a dark brown background. The design is in black and white, giving it an abstract quality that could be interpreted as either a cartoon or an AI-generated character.
What emotion is the smile evoking?
The smile evokes feelings of joy and happiness.
